must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related fields, 4+ years of professional experience as a software engineer, Familiar with at least one of C++, Python, or Golang, Strong background in scalable backend design, with the ability to make sound design decisions, Familiar with common cloud-based technologies and services, Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team, Must be willing and able to work onsite five days per week

job_summary: Verkada is transforming how organizations protect their people and places with an integrated, AI-powered platform. The role involves leading the development of large-scale, high-performance backend systems and collaborating with cross-functional teams to enhance the software infrastructure for cloud camera products.
